description_long: This object is a cylindrical bollard with a smooth, continuous surface and a subtle horizontal banding texture that wraps around its entire body. The coloration is a gradient of light to medium gray, giving it a concrete or weathered metal appearance. The top of the bollard is gently rounded, blending seamlessly into the sides without any sharp edges or decorative features. There are no visible openings, reflective markings, or attachment points for chains or connectors. The base appears to be flat, suggesting it is designed to sit flush against the ground. Its minimalist design is typical for urban environments where visual unobtrusiveness and durability are prioritized.
description: A smooth, cylindrical gray bollard with subtle horizontal banding and a rounded top, resembling concrete or metal. It has a flat base and no visible markings or connectors.
description_view_0: The bollard is seen from the front, showing its rounded top and the horizontal banding texture most clearly.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the uniform cylindrical shape and the consistent banding pattern around the body.
description_view_2: Another front-facing view, nearly identical to view 0, emphasizing the smooth, seamless surface and rounded top.
description_view_3: A side view similar to view 1, again showing the continuous banding and cylindrical form.
